titleStmt.title: SII 8.290: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 290. (A.R. No. 20 of 1903). ON THE SAME GOPURA, LEFT OF ENTRANCE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrāja
rājatevaṟku yāṇṭu pattuonpatāvatu vṛ c
cikanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣa ttu trayodaśi yum
nāyaṟṟukkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revatināḷ va
ṭakarai virutarājabha yaṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu me
ṟakkānāṭṭu brahmade yam tiṭṭaikuṭiyāṉa ti
rucciṟṟampalaccaturvvedi maṅkalattu ma hāsabh Ai
yom Uṭaiyār Ūruṭait tiruttāntoṉṟi
īśvara muṭaiyanāyaṉāṟku candrādi ttavaṟ cella
Eṅka(ḷ)ḷukku naṉṟāka Amutupaṭi cāttupaṭi cel
vatāka kal veṭṭikkuṭutta Ūrāvatu . Ivvūr vaṭapiṭā
kai Iḷamaṅkalameṉṟu per kūvappaṭṭa Ūṟku ki
ḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉam koṅkap
yaṅkaran tirunantavaṉattukkum Ivvūr vaṭapiṭākai
miṉavanallūr Ellaikku meṟkum tenpāṟkel
lai nivāvāṟṟu niroṭukālukku vaṭakku mipāṟ
kellai Inṉāyaṉār tevatānam tirunāmattukkāṇi kiḻ
cciṟuvā(y)yāṉa kalikaṭintacoḻamaṅkalattu El
laikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai nakarai melvaḻi
kiḻvaḻiyum pulivalam Uḷḷiṭṭa Ūrkaḷ Ellaikku
teṟkkum Ikkuṟitta Inṉānkellaiyi(l)lum naṭuvu
paṭṭa Ūrnattamum kanṟunilaipāḻum naṉcai
puncaikaḷum Erikaḷum nirkovaikaḷum Akap
paṭa muṟṟil Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy
Anupavittu potukiṟa naṉcai puṉcaiyum Ivvūr nat
tattu kariyamāṇikkattāḻvār tirumuṟṟamum tiruviṭai
yāṭṭamum sādha ṉappaṭiye Anubha vittuvarukiṟa nila
m nikki nikkiniṉṟa Ūrnattamum kaṉṟunilaipāḻum nan
cai puṉcaiyum Eri muṉṟum Ivaiyiṟṟil nirko
vaiyum nivāvāṟṟil bhāgāśra yamum Akappaṭa Āṟṟil
Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukāṇiyāka vilaikoṇṭa I
rukūṟṟāl vaṉta Ūrnattattilum kaṉṟunilaipāḻum nancai
puṉcaiyum Erimunṟilum nirkovaikaḷilum nivāvāṟṟi
l bhāgāśra yaṅkaḷilum Irukūṟu nikki Eṅkaḷutāy Irun
ta Orukūṟṟāl Ūrnattattilum kaṉṟunilaipāḻum naṉcai puṉcai
yum Eri munṟilum nirkovaiyilum nivāvāṟṟil bhā
gāśra[*] yatti(l)lum Akappaṭa muṟṟum pāra tāya
n Ūruṭaipperumāḷ pāṇṭavatūtaṉāṉa yi
ḷaiya Irā[ja*]rā[ja*] piramā(rā)rāyar pakkal vilaiko
ṇṭapaṭiye Eṅkaḷ piramāṇattu meṟppa
ṭṭa kācu Irupattu Aiyyāyirattil Innāyaṉā
r(ṟ)kku nāṅkaḷ tiruppaṇikkuṭalāka nirvārttu
kkuṭutta kācu patiṉmuvāyiramum nikki nikki nāṅ
kaḷ kaiyil koṇṭa kācu panni(r)rāyiram Ikkācu
pannirrāyiramum koṇṭu Eṅkaḷukku naṉṟāka In
ṉāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārattile nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇ
ṭa sādha na(m)mum Oṭukki Ippaṭi kal veṭṭikoḷ
ka veṉṟu ma hāsa painiyokam kuṭuttom Iv
vūrkku camainta Aṭaippu kavuṇiyan tirumāliruṉ
colai śrīkṛṣṇa paṭṭanum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭanum
tiruntappontanampiyum cūriyatevappaṭṭaṉum karu
ṇākaranampiyum ciraṅkapaṭṭaṉum tiruvaraṅkapaṭṭaṉum
karuṇākarapaṭṭaṉum Īśvara paṭṭaṉum tiru �
ṉnampiyum maturāntaka pirammārāyaṉum te
vaṉāyakapaṭṭaṉum vikkiramacoḻap pirammārāyanu
m tiruvaraṅkamāḷipaṭṭaṉum kūṭṭattu śrīrāmapirānpa
ṭṭaṉum varantarumperumāḷnampiyum nilakka
paṭṭaṉum sarvvādi ttapaṭṭaṉum vāriyam kecava
perumāḷnampiyum paṟavaikkaracupaṭṭaṉum
tāmotarapaṭṭaṉum nārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉum Ā
ka Ivvaṉaivom
Digital edition of SII 8.290 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
